name: Fruit Medley Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Optional: Prepare the Della Robbia Ice Ring in advance.
2. In a blender, puree the frozen strawberries. Thaw and do not add water to the frozen orange juice.
3. In a punch bowl, combine the strawberry puree, apricot nectar, cold water, lemon juice, orange juice concentrate, and sugar into the pitcher. Stir until the sugar dissolves.
4. Slowly pour in the chilled ginger ale. If desired, add the Della Robbia Ice Ring.
